meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build a high-impact portfolio rapidly. Accelerate your SaaS MVP development with advanced AI engineering.
content.answer_block: Eliminate the 'no portfolio' barrier by using Claude Code to autonomously architect and ship production-ready SaaS modules. By integrating Antigravity for rapid prototyping, you transform complex requirements into deployed code in minutes, proving your technical execution capability to investors and customers through tangible, high-velocity product delivery.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the founder’s greatest adversary. You have the vision, the market insight, and the drive, but your repository is empty. In the current SaaS economy, ideas are cheap—execution is the only currency that buys trust. If you cannot point to a live, functional, and well-architected product, you are fighting a losing battle for market share and funding.

Today, we bridge the gap between 'idea' and 'shipped.' By leveraging Claude Code as an autonomous engine and Antigravity as your scaffolding framework, you will stop writing boilerplate and start engineering value. This is not just about building code; it is about building a reputation for speed, precision, and architectural maturity.

steps.title: Define the High-Value MVP Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, define a modular architecture that solves a specific, painful problem for a niche audience. This proves you are a product thinker, not just a coder.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Architect a lean, scalable SaaS module for [INSERT PROBLEM]. Outline the database schema, API endpoints, and auth flow. Prioritize speed-to-market and security.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a new project structure based on the architectural plan provided by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Configure the Agentic Environment
steps.description: Establish the Claude Code environment with strict context guidelines to ensure the AI adheres to production-grade coding standards and your specific tech stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a .claudeignore and system prompt configuration for a high-performance React/Node.js stack. Ensure focus on clean code and robust error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config --set system-prompt 'You are an expert full-stack engineer. Prioritize security, modularity, and clean API design.'

steps.title: Rapid Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on core features. Focus on the 'Golden Path'—the specific sequence of events that provides the user with their 'Aha!' moment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a detailed implementation plan for the user authentication and dashboard view, focusing on immediate value delivery.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the authentication module and dashboard layout based on the provided architectural requirements.'

steps.title: Integration of Antigravity Scaffolding
steps.description: Inject Antigravity components to automate repetitive UI/UX tasks, allowing you to focus on the unique business logic that differentiates your SaaS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the boilerplate for a responsive SaaS dashboard grid using the Antigravity design system and best practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate the Antigravity components into the existing codebase and ensure seamless styling across the dashboard.'

steps.title: Rigorous Quality Assurance and Refactoring
steps.description: Use Claude Code to audit your own work. This step turns a prototype into a professional-grade asset that looks great in a portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, and adherence to clean code principles. Suggest refactors.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Review the entire project for security flaws and performance improvements. Apply fixes and document the changes.'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Decision Log' in your README; investors value the *why* behind your architectural choices more than the code itself.
Use Claude Code to document your API endpoints automatically as you build; documentation is the hallmark of a senior engineer.
Focus on shipping one high-fidelity feature rather than five broken ones; depth of execution beats breadth of scope.
Treat your GitHub commit history as a narrative; use descriptive commit messages to show your development process to potential stakeholders.
Leverage the Antigravity framework to standardize your UI components early, ensuring your MVP looks like a finished product from day one.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to Vercel or Railway, document the business impact on a landing page, and start cold-emailing prospects to validate your solution.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical leverage to build faster than 99% of your competition. Stop waiting for the perfect time and start building the product that defines your career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
